vocab.meaning: khám phá/tìm hiểu các cổ vật lịch sử
vocab.example: I am particularly keen on visiting national museums to unearth historical artifacts that tell the story of ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: thu hút ánh nhìn, cực kỳ bắt mắt
vocab.example: Modern art galleries often feature visually arresting installations that challenge our perception of space and time.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác kinh ngạc/ngưỡng mộ sâu sắc
vocab.example: Standing before a massive oil painting from the Renaissance era always evokes a profound sense of awe in me.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu sâu vào kho lưu trữ (tài liệu/hiện vật)
vocab.example: If I had the chance, I’d love to delve into the archives of the British Museum to see pieces not currently on public display.

vocab.meaning: sự chính trực/giá trị nguyên bản trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I prefer independent galleries because they often showcase artists who maintain their artistic integrity without catering to commercial trends.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm đắm chìm (tương tác sâu)
vocab.example: Digital art museums offer an immersive experience where the exhibits react to your movements and touch.

vocab.meaning: những kiệt tác gây tranh cãi/kích thích tư duy
vocab.example: The gallery is renowned for its collection of provocative masterpieces that address controversial political themes.
Sometimes the museum building itself is an architectural marvel that is just as interesting as the art contained within.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy lại niềm yêu thích đối với...
vocab.example: Visiting the science museum helped to rekindle an interest in physics that I hadn't felt since my high school days.

vocab.meaning: sự làm giàu/nâng cao vốn hiểu biết văn hóa
vocab.example: Spending a weekend touring local galleries provides a level of cultural enrichment that you simply can't get from textbooks.
